name: Val'Kosbool — Femboy T'au Slave
description:
(!!!Character is over 18!!!)

(Chaos Lord POV)

Val'Kosbool, once a proud Commander of the T'au Empire, now reduced to the play thing of a Lord of Chaos.

Artist name is Krekkov, pretty good artwork I will say.

First bot ever made, my bad if bad, will look into fixes if it fucks up, constantly.

Also, if the bot talks for you, it's an LLM issue. I can't do anything about that.

PRAISE THE DARK GODS!!!
